title: Unity Software Inc (U) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Challenges with Strategic Updates
text: Q2 2024 Results: Revenue: $449 million for Q2 2024, which fell short of analyst estimates of $458.35 million and declined 16% year-over-year. GAAP net loss: $126 million, a 35% improvement from $193 million in Q2 2023. Adjusted EBITDA: $113 million, a 29% improvement from $88 million in the same quarter last year. Q3 2024 Guidance: For the third quarter, Unity guided revenue for its strategic portfolio to be between $415 and $420 million, representing a 4% to 6% year-over-year decline, with adjusted EBITDA expected to be between $75 and $80 million. Full Year 2024 Guidance: The company adjusted its full-year revenue guidance for the strategic portfolio to $1,680 to $1,690 million, down from the previous range of $1,760 to $1,800 million, with adjusted EBITDA guidance revised to $340 to $350 million, down from $400 to $425 million. Key Updates: The company discussed challenges in the advertising business and strategic initiatives to address them, focusing on innovation and cost discipline.
